title: Behind the Scenes of TEDx PESU 2023: A Volunteer’s Journey
description: An inside look at organizing TEDx PESU 2023, lessons in event production, and navigating the challenges of a large-scale event.

title: Attention is all you need
description: A deep dive into the architecture of Transformers, attention mechanisms, and sequence-to-sequence learning.

title: PCA — Principal Component Analysis
description: An intuitive look into Principal Component Analysis, dimensionality reduction, and uncovering patterns in high-dimensional data.

title: Inside Silicon Unplugged: Conversations That Shaped Our Perspective
description: Key takeaways from the Silicon Unplugged AMA session with industry veterans on semiconductors, AI hardware, and engineering careers.

description: An inside look into VLSI DAY 2025, featuring industry pioneers discussing the future of semiconductors beyond AI.

description: Reflections on leading event production for TEDxPESU 2024 and the incredible speakers who made it possible.

title: Second Order Effects in MOSFETS: Short-Channel Effects
description: An deep dive into short-channel effects including DIBL, Vth roll-off, and hot carriers.

description: Understanding the body effect and how it alters transistor threshold voltage.

title: Second Order Effects in MOSFETS: Channel Length Modulation
description: An intuitive explanation of channel length modulation in MOSFETs.

title: Deep Dive into Q-Karyashala 2024
description: Quantum computing and next-generation materials are moving onto hardware chips. Key takeaways on quantum photonics, superconducting systems, cryogenic memory, and neuromorphic computing.

title: My Experience at IEEE CEDA SMS 2026: Exploring India's Semiconductor Future
description: Insights and key takeaways from the IEEE CEDA Semiconductor Manufacturing Symposium (SMS 2026) on India's semiconductor ecosystem and manufacturing process.
